productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Brown Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this loafer makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Slip-on style for easy on/off Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with modified herringbone lugs on the forefoot and mid heel, and grooved on the periphery of the forefoot, and front and back heel for absolute grip and traction Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
